message:
perf: reduce latency in zstd, control batching, and WebGPU render path

- Reuse WASM src/dst buffers in zstd compress/decompress (0 mallocs steady-state)
- Replace rAF with queueMicrotask for control message batching (~0-1ms vs 0-16ms)
- Pre-allocate WebGPU render pass descriptor outside render loop
- Simplify decodePreviewFrame copy with Uint8Array.slice()
